title: mentha × verticillata f. austiana
intro: Mentha × verticillata f. austiana, also known as Bowles' mint or austrian mint, is a hybrid plant in the mint family Lamiaceae, characterized by its compact growth habit and distinctive leaf shape. This plant is rich in menthol and menthone, which contribute to its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mentha × verticillata f. austiana include relief from digestive issues, headaches, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce stress and improve mental focus. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas, tinctures, and infused oils, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
